text: I find myself in a strikingly modern space, surrounded by glass walls, bold colors, and intriguing displays labeled "R+D." The environment buzzes with the energy of innovation and discovery, suggesting a museum or a tech-focused exhibit. I feel both curious and contemplative here; the emphasis on research and development stirs thoughts about humanity's relationship with technology. The angular lines and bright lighting give the place an almost clinical feeling, yet the colorful designs soften it—inviting me to ponder creativity and reason together. I feel open, alert, and ready to absorb what this space has to offer, even as subtle discomfort from the sterile orderliness lingers within me.
